## Autonomy boundary

- Scientific autonomy:
- Operational autonomy:
- Undeclared loop stages are not implied: [ ]

## Curation gate

- [ ] Biology-specific relevance is direct.
- [ ] DOI -> canonical URL -> normalized title duplicate check completed.
- [ ] At least one primary source is present.
- [ ] Bilingual summaries and boundary note are present for data changes.
- [ ] `last_verified`, `curator`, and `decision_note` are present for verified data.
- [ ] Candidate automation did not directly modify verified data.
- [ ] `pnpm validate` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm check:generated` passes after `pnpm generate` was committed.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.

## License

- [ ] I have not relicensed third-party material and have documented ambiguous terms.
